zh.lifeSummary: 當Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsölden於1205年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 海爾布洛倫貝爾斯坦時，她的父親Berthold Graf von Beilstein-Wolfsölden42歲，母親Adelheid von Bonfeld26歲。她和Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor至少有1個女兒。她去世於1236年在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 凱拉海姆凱拉海姆史瓦本享年31歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Ricun, a diminutive of Rich , itself a pet form of Richard , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. It appears that a dialectally different (Norman or Picard) form of the French name, with medial /-k-/, also survived in England for a time alongside forms with original /-tʃ-/.

variants.name: Rich
meanings: Short form of Richard . There was a medieval given name Rich(e), but it is connected only indirectly with the modern form. It is a short form of several medieval names, including not only Richard but also other, rarer names of Old French (Germanic) origin with the same first element, as, for example, Rich(i)er ‘power army’ and Richaud ‘power rule’.

en.lifeSummary: When Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsölden was born in 1205, in Beilstein, Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, her father, Berthold Graf von Beilstein-Wolfsölden, was 42 and her mother, Adelheid von Bonfeld, was 26. She had at least 1 daughter with Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor. She died in 1236, in Schwaben, Kelheim, Kelheim, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 31.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor. Elle est décédée en 1236, à Schwaben, Kelheim, Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 31 ans.

ko.Schwaben, Kelheim, Bayern, Deutschland: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 켈하임 켈하임 슈와벤
ko.lifeSummary: Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsölden(이)가 1205년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 헤이브론 브이스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Berthold Graf von Beilstein-Wolfsölden(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Bonfeld(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1236년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 켈하임 켈하임 슈와벤에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richina de Beilstein-Wolfsölden родилась в 1205 г. в местности билстин, ландкрис хилбронн, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Berthold Graf von Beilstein-Wolfsölden было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Bonfeld, 26. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor. Она умерла в 1236 г. в местности щвабен, келхим, ландкрис келхим, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 31 год.
